room.caption: [WarshipZ_F]

locationCheck(99) if global.gameProgress=5320 {global.gameProgress=5325} SS_SetSoundFreq(global.msc_CentralCore,22050)
background_visible[1]=1; background_visible[2]=1 background_alpha[1]=0.04; background_alpha[2]=0.04
abilSetRemove(1) global.hasShoes[0]=2; global.hasShoes[1]=2
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20MainA) mapScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh20SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1016) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
